title: Lands End | Golden Gate National Parks Conservancy
content: Crissy Field by Michael Schwab. Schwab image of a long-billed shorebird walking on a beach with hills and clouds in the distance. # Lands End. Lands End by Michael Schwab. Along the way you’ll see hillsides of cypress and wildflowers, views of old shipwrecks, access to the epic ruins of Sutro Baths in the Sutro Historic District, pocket beaches, and a new Lookout Visitor Center. **Public transportation is the best way to get to Lands End.**. At different times a Native American fishing ground, a treacherous coastline for doomed ships, and home to an amusement park and swimming facility, Lands End is an important part of Ohlone and San Francisco history. Enjoying colors of sunset at Lands End. Sunset through the cypress at Lands End. Cypress trees in fog at Lands End. Parks Conservancy staff lead a wildflower walk at Lands End. Rocky beach at the end of the Mile Rock Trail. Tunes on Trails outdoor performance at Lands End. Sunset through the cypress at Lands End. Colors of sunset wash over Sutro Baths.

title: LANDS END - 1953 Photos & 471 Reviews - Parks - Yelp
content: This is amongst my favorite trails to hike in SF because it has a gorgeous view of the ocean and Golden Gate Bridge. It also has a lovely patch of Calla Lily.
